project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: JC being down manned today flight to Esbjerg around 12:30
Perenco have requested to collect the leak detection tool's on Friday. They will arrive from Archer shortly and be tested tomorrow along with our QPC's and PRT's in preparation for the loadout.
